narratives.Overview: Configurable prompts to stretch, walk, and drink water: a gentle audio cue through the already-playing stream, an in-app banner, and optional browser notifications.
narratives.Requirements: FR-1: Configurable break types (stretch, walk, water, custom label) each with its own interval and enable toggle. FR-2: Audio cue plays through the master bus when a break fires. FR-3: Optional Notification API alerts with graceful degradation when permission is denied. FR-4: In-app banner with dismiss and snooze. NFR-1: Prompts fire reliably while the tab is backgrounded (audio-clock-driven, not setTimeout-only).
narratives.LockedDecisions: Refinement 2026-07-13 (#2 Evaluate lock): (1) AC locked as FR-1–4 + NFR-1 as written in Requirements — no MVP carve-outs. (2) Scope boundary with #6 Whole-session presets: this scope (#2) owns break runtime behavior and the break settings UI; #6 only persists those settings inside presets (save/apply), and does not implement break scheduling, cues, banner, or notifications. (3) Cue channels for MVP: audio cue + in-app banner are required; browser notifications remain optional with graceful deny (FR-3).

items.title: Break schedule model and per-type configuration UI
Audio cue + in-app banner with snooze/dismiss
